project_privacy_data_flows.description: When the frontend WebView requests a barcode scan, the app activates the rear camera via CameraX API, uses local ZXing/MLKit libraries to decode barcode content, and returns the result to the frontend.

flow_steps.details: The frontend WebView requests a barcode scan via external bus message, and the BarcodeScanner overlay is displayed over the WebView.

flow_steps.code: @Composable fun BarcodeScanner(...) { ... CameraX composable for live preview ... }
flow_steps.details: The device rear camera is activated via CameraX API, displaying a live viewfinder preview on screen.

flow_steps.code: fun handleScanResult(rawValue: String, format: BarcodeFormat) { sendScanResultToFrontend(rawValue, format) }
flow_steps.details: The decoded barcode content is extracted and sent back to the frontend WebView via external bus.
